3370.reason: The logic is inverted: returns true when there are no errors, but should return true when errors exist. Should be `return !errors.isEmpty();`

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  The logic is inverted: returns true when there are no errors, but should return true when errors exist. Should be `return !errors.isEmpty();`
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [逻辑错误：当errors为空时表示没有错误，应返回true；但isEmpty()返回true表示集合为空，即没有错误，所以这里应该返回!errors.isEmpty()。当前实现导致hasError()在无错误时返回true，有错误时返回false，与预期行为相反。]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The method should return true when errors exist, but isEmpty() returns true when the collection is empty. It should be !errors.isEmpty().
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The logic is inverted: this returns true when there are NO errors, but it should return true when errors exist. This causes the program to output to parser.txt when errors are present and to error.txt when there are no errors.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This returns true when there are NO errors, but should return true when there ARE errors. The logic is inverted - it should return !errors.isEmpty()]

140.reason: [The while condition can cause an infinite loop if there is an odd number of backslashes before the closing quote, and also leads to double appending of the closing quote when the previous character is a backslash. Additionally, there is no bounds check; if the string never ends, an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException will occur.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The while condition can cause an infinite loop if there is an odd number of backslashes before the closing quote, and also leads to double appending of the closing quote when the previous character is a backslash. Additionally, there is no bounds check; if the string never ends, an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException will occur.]

154.reason: [Same issue as above: the while condition is flawed for escaped quotes and lacks bounds checking.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: the while condition is flawed for escaped quotes and lacks bounds checking.]

76.reason: [The loop condition does not check for end-of-input, causing potential StringIndexOutOfBoundsException when the string literal is not properly terminated.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The loop condition does not check for end-of-input, causing potential StringIndexOutOfBoundsException when the string literal is not properly terminated.]

85.reason: [Same issue as string literal: no bounds check, may read beyond input length.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as string literal: no bounds check, may read beyond input length.]
